item.title: Create a blog with Hugo on Github
item.author: Author
item.description: write ahead my blog code would help you create your own blog https://github.com/mobilephone724/hugoBlog/ create a blog on local Quick Start | Hugo (gohugo.io) install hugo Install Hugo | Hugo (gohugo.io) It seems installation on windows is a little harder. The following actions are based on linux create a new site 1 hugo new site quickstart The above will create a new Hugo site in a folder named quickstart.
